emails.subject: Re: Questa Petroleum.
emails.body: Do you have a home for the T&F Explor behind Penn Fuel for June? I left a message for Charlie at CES this morning about all the other citygate production. I'm also trying to get a bid from CNG for the month of June on the EOG and Peoples gas. I'll keep you posted. From: John M Singer ENRON 05/09/2000 01:07 PM

emails.subject: Re: Questa Petroleum.
emails.body: No home yet. May have to take to Penn Fuel. I left a message with Equitable to see if they are interested in Peoples, EOG, Equitrans and Penn Fuel. What are you going to do with the CPA. Bary Vanderhorst w/EES might be interested. If not I wll contact Equitable. I will contact Dominion to see if they are interested in any of this gas. John Chris Germany@ECT 05/22/2000 11:26 AM

emails.subject: Re: Questa Petroleum.
emails.body: I just spoke with CES. CES will keep the National Fuel for the month of June since June is the last month. Please call me when you get a chance to discuss everything. I did not discuss the Equitrans gas with CES. I want to talk to Scott about that tomorrow. From: John M Singer ENRON 05/22/2000 11:49 AM
